zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Bradleye於1203年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親Thomas de Bradleye29歲，母親Wife of Thomas de Bradleye25歲。她與William de Franceis I結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1256年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Bradleye于1203年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，她的父亲Thomas de Bradleye29岁，母亲Wife of Thomas de Bradleye25岁。她与William de Franceis I结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1256年在英国英格兰德比夏爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bradleye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places throughout England named Bradley, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Scottish: habitational name from Braidlie in Roxburghshire.
Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Brolcháin ‘descendant of Brolacháin’, a diminutive of the personal name Brólach, compare Brawley . This was a learned family.

variants.name: Brawley
meanings: Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Brólaigh ‘descendant of Brolach’, a personal name possibly derived from brollach ‘breast’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Bradleye was born in 1203, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Bradleye, was 29 and her mother, Wife of Thomas de Bradleye, was 25. She married William de Franceis I. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1256, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Bradleye est née en 1203, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Bradleye, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Wife of Thomas de Bradleye, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William de Franceis I. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1256, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Bradleye 1203 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Bradleye 29 und ihre Mutter Wife of Thomas de Bradleye 25. Sie hat William de Franceis I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1256 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Bradleye è nata il nel 1203 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Bradleye, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Wife of Thomas de Bradleye, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato William de Franceis I. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1256, nel Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bradleyeが1203年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas de Bradleyeは29歳，母Wife of Thomas de Bradleyeは25歳であった。William de Franceis Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1256年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Bradleye(이)가 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Bradleye(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Wife of Thomas de Bradleye(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 William de Franceis I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Bradleye nasceu em 1203, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Bradleye, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Wife of Thomas de Bradleye, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Franceis I. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1256, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Bradleye родилась в 1203 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Bradleye было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Wife of Thomas de Bradleye, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Franceis I. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1256 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Bradleye nació en 1203, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Bradleye, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Wife of Thomas de Bradleye, tenía 25 años. Se casó con William de Franceis I. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1256, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
